data.title: Binance’s CZ asks crypto companies to explore Kyrgyzstan after his 2-day tour
data.description:
Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) urges crypto companies to explore Kyrgyzstan after a two-day visit with President Sadyr Japarov.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cz-crypto-explore-kyrgyzstan/

data.title: Glassnode: The reduction in BTC holdings by "Diamond Hand" has put greater resistance to price increases. The current bottom-fishing funds have failed to generate sufficient demand to absorb the selling pressure.
data.description: Glassnode posted on social media that illiquid Bitcoin supply has begun to decline, with approximately 62,000 BTC transferred out of long-dormant wallets since mid-October. When illiquid supply decreases, more tokens enter circulation. Without strong new demand, upward price trends face greater resistance. Illiquid supply has been a significant driver of this cycle, but the recent reversal has disrupted this trend. Historically, similar supply reversals have weakened market momentum—a larger outflow of 400,000 BTC occurred in January 2024. While the current change is relatively mild, the trend is noteworthy. Interestingly, whale wallets have continued to increase their holdings during this period. Whale holdings have steadily increased over the past 30 days, with no significant sell-offs since October 15th. The largest and most consistent outflows have primarily come from wallets holding 0.1-10 BTC (approximately $10,000 to $1 million). This group has been consistently net sellers since November 2024. Momentum traders have largely exited the market, while bargain hunting funds have failed to generate sufficient demand to absorb the selling pressure. As first-time buyers remain on the sidelines, this supply-demand imbalance will continue to suppress prices until stronger spot demand emerges.

data.title: Crypto Market Deleverages; JPMorgan Eyes Crypto Collateral
data.description:
JPMorgan considers crypto as collateral post-market deleveraging. Bitcoin, Ethereum futures outlook improves, says Tom Lee.
source: https://coincu.com/news/jpmorgan-considers-crypto-collateral/

data.title: A certain address made a profit of 760% in less than 2 days by trading PING.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the address starting with 0xe688 made a profit of $675,000 through PING transactions in less than two days. It is reported that he previously spent $89,000 to buy 13.42 million PING, then sold 6.72 million PING for $377,000. He currently holds 6.72 million PING (approximately $387,000), for a total profit of $675,000 (+759%).

data.description:
Global central banks’ gold reserves surpass US Treasury holdings for the first time in 30 years as bullion tops $4,000 per ounce.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/central-banks-ditch-us-dollar-for-gold/

data.title: Paxos Releases PYUSD Verification Report: Total Circulation Exceeds 2.6 Billion, a Record High, Up 125.5% from August
data.description: Paxos has released an assurance report for its stablecoin, PYUSD, issued by KPMG, one of the "Big Four" accounting firms. The report reveals that as of October 15th, the total outstanding PYUSD tokens reached a record high of 2,638,336,904. The notional value of redeemable collateral in total net assets was $2,652,728,424, exceeding the total outstanding PYUSD tokens. Paxos reportedly did not release its September assurance report, but in August, it reported a total outstanding PYUSD token of 1,169,714,720, representing a 125.5% increase in the past two months.

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts Cryptocurrency Market Recovery by Year-End
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Tom Lee stated in a CNBC interview that the cryptocurrency market experienced a significant deleveraging event on October 11, attributed partly to tariffs and trade tensions. This incident is considered the most severe liquidation event in the crypto industry over the past five years, with its repercussions still lingering. Despite the persistent pessimism two weeks later, Lee believes these trends are nearing an end. He noted that Bitcoin and Ethereum contract holdings are at historic lows, and both are showing positive technical indicators. Lee anticipates a market upturn by the end of the year. Additionally, JPMorgan recently indicated the possibility of accepting cryptocurrencies as collateral, which could bolster market confidence.

data.title: Binance will adjust PM Pro collateralization ratio and contract leverage tiers
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will adjust the collateralization ratios for multiple assets under the Portfolio Margin model and the collateralization ratios for PMPro tiers at 2:00 PM on October 28, 2025, and 2:00 PM on October 31, 2025, respectively. Binance Futures will also update the leverage and margin tiers for multiple USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts at 2:30 PM on October 31, 2025, respectively. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Gate Alpha has launched the 82nd round of points airdrop. Holders of corresponding points can receive 70 or 280 CDL
data.description: According to official news, Gate Alpha will launch the 82nd CDL Points airdrop at 16:00 (UTC+8) on October 25th. This airdrop will utilize a tiered airdrop model. Users with 120 ≤ Gate Alpha Points ≤ 159 will receive 70 CDL tokens, which will cost 12 Gate Alpha Points. Users with 160 or more Gate Alpha Points will receive 280 CDL tokens, which will cost 15 Gate Alpha Points.

data.title: OKX will launch GIGGLE perpetual contracts
data.description: OKX has announced the launch of GIGGLE perpetual contracts. GIGGLEUSDT contract trading will begin at 3:00 PM on October 25, 2025 (UTC+8).

data.title: Gate Web3 announces upcoming support for the x402 protocol
data.description: Gate Web3 has officially announced that it has established a dedicated x402 protocol trading area on its platform and will soon officially integrate the protocol. Currently, the trading area has launched a dedicated chart, initially covering 10 popular x402-related tokens. Market data and trading functionality for these tokens have been fully integrated. The x402 protocol, based on HTTP402, aims to monetize APIs and content through on-chain payments (such as USDC), support autonomous transactions by Al agents, and optimize the Web3 payment experience.

data.title: Binance to Update Collateral Ratios and Leverage Tiers for Portfolio Margin and Futures Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, significant updates are scheduled for the collateral ratios and tiered collateral ratios under Portfolio Margin and PM Pro. These changes will take effect on 2025-10-28 and 2025-10-31, impacting various assets. On 2025-10-28, assets such as ZEC, FIL, ALGO, A, RUNE, AR, LUNC, THETA, ICP, NEO, PNUT, SPK, CHZ, and NOT will see adjustments in their collateral ratios. For instance, ZEC's collateral ratio will increase from 20% to 30%, while FIL's will decrease from 70% to 50%. Similarly, ALGO's ratio will drop from 60% to 50%, and A's from 65% to 45%. Other assets like RUNE, AR, LUNC, THETA, ICP, NEO, PNUT, SPK, CHZ, and NOT will also experience reductions in their collateral ratios.

Further adjustments will occur on 2025-10-31, affecting assets under PM Pro. ZEC, RUNE, A, LUNC, AR, and CHZ will have their collateral ratios modified across various rank floors and caps. For example, ZEC's collateral ratio will range from 10% to 80% depending on the rank floor and cap. RUNE's collateral ratio will vary from 10% to 100%, while A, LUNC, AR, and CHZ will see ratios between 10% and 100%. Additionally, Binance Futures will update leverage and margin tiers for several USD-M Perpetual Contracts, including CHILLGUYUSDT, FLOCKUSDT, FIDAUSDT, NEWTUSDT, INITUSDT, KAVAUSDT, ZKCUSDT, COSUSDT, 1000000BOBUSDT, BIDUSDT, DEGOUSDT, KDAUSDT, LIGHTUSDT, EVAAUSDT, CLOUSDT, and KGENUSDT. These updates will affect existing positions and may lead to the expiration of futures running grids. Users are advised to adjust their positions accordingly to avoid potential liquidation or losses due to changes in collateral ratios and leverage tiers.

data.title: A whale transferred about 20,000 ETH to Binance, facing a $15.4 million loss after holding the coins for two months.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale deposited 19,929 ETH (worth $78.29 million) into Binance after holding it for two months, facing a $15.4 million loss. The whale initially withdrew 22,177 ETH, worth $101.95 million, from Binance and Bybit.

data.title: A certain address spent $1.2 million to buy 4,794 GIGGLE coins after Binance launched GIGGLE spot trading, and currently has a floating profit of $48,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address (0x279...1688) purchased 4,794.46 GIGGLE tokens at an average price of $251.17 17 minutes after Binance announced the GIGGLE spot listing, spending a total of approximately $1.2 million and becoming one of the top 20 GIGGLE holdings. This address currently has a floating profit of $48,000 and has not yet sold any GIGGLE tokens.

data.title: Common (COMMON) will be listed on Binance Alpha and Futures
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will open COMMON trading on Binance Alpha at 8:00 PM (UTC) on October 27, 2025, and will also launch COMMONUSDT perpetual contracts (50x leverage) at 8:30 PM (UTC) on the same day. Binance will also airdrop COMMON tokens to eligible users, who can claim them using Binance Alpha Points between 8:00 PM (UTC) on October 27, 2025, and 8:00 PM (UTC) on October 28, 2025. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)
